notes: request_file_edits.rs:339 'Failed to generate diffs {err:?}' is the full: arm of safe_warn! (logging/telemetry sink, not UI) -> telemetry_payload. native.rs:428 'The remote codebase at {} is not indexed yet.' is SearchCodebaseResult::Failed.message surfaced to the user; translated with {} preserved (filled by remote_path.path). settings_view/mod.rs:510-511 PROMPT_SUBMISSION_INTERRUPT/QUEUE are values of context-flag &str constants (identifier/protocol keys, not UI) -> protocol_key. privacy_page.rs:2018 'cloud AI conversation storage' is description_suffix for ToggleSettingActionPair::new, rendered to user as 'Enable/Disable {suffix}' in command palette -> translated UI fragment. workspace/view.rs entries are all MenuItemFields::new(...) tab-group context-menu labels -> translated; 'Untitled group' is the unwrap_or_else fallback display name for an unnamed group -> translated. graphql_helpers.rs:66 'User not in context: Not found' is matched via error.message.contains(...) against a server GraphQL response to detect a disabled/deleted account; it is a protocol comparison literal, never rendered -> protocol_key.
